name: product-wiki
description: Product Wiki is an open-source harness for building software with coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: An open-source harness for building software with coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Product Wiki is an open-source harness for building software with coding agents. It is especially useful for non-technical builders who want to build complex products without the codebase turning messy.
defaultPrompt: Draft the first product wiki for this repo.
Turn this feature request into a wiki proposal.
Compile the approved proposal into checks and code.
